basic_details.job_title: HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Bilaspur Recruitment 2026: Notification Out for 10 Para Pump Operator, Para Fitter and Multipurpose Worker Posts
basic_details.department: Jal Shakti Vibhag, Jal Shakti Division Bilaspur, Himachal Pradesh
basic_details.total_vacancies: Para Pump Operator, Para Fitter, Multipurpose Worker
basic_details.short_information: The table below gives a quick overview of this HP Jal Shakti Vibhag recruitment notice.

age_limit.details: The age limit for all three posts, Para Pump Operator, Para Fitter and Multipurpose Worker, is 18 to 45 years. | The age-calculation date and category-wise age relaxation details are not mentioned in the notice.

qualification.details: Only bona-fide Himachali candidates are eligible to apply for this recruitment. Candidates belonging to SC, ST, OBC and EWS categories must submit their relevant category certificate along with the application. The educational qualification required for each post is given in the table below.

salary_details.details: Para Pump Operator: ₹7,100 per month Para Fitter: ₹7,100 per month Multipurpose Worker: ₹6,000 per month

selection_process: Para Fitter and Multipurpose Worker posts will be done through the following stages:
applicable if the number of applications received is much higher than the number of posts Skill test or physical test
as per the requirement of the post applied for
Original certificates and testimonials will be verified at the time of evaluation
before the skill or physical test.
how_to_apply: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Eligible candidates can follow the steps below to apply.
Download the application form for Para Pump Operator/Para Fitter/Multipurpose Worker from the notice or collect it from the JSV Division Bilaspur office.
Fill in the applicant's name, father's name, date of birth, permanent home address and correspondence address in capital letters.
Fill the educational and technical qualification table with marks obtained, total marks and percentage.
Attach attested/self-attested copies of all required certificates.
Sign the declaration confirming that the details provided are true and correct.
Submit the completed application form to Jal Shakti Division Bilaspur on or before 5:00 PM on 17 August 2026.
Candidates applying for more than one post must submit a separate application form for each post.
important_instructions: Verify your eligibility for the post before applying. It is the responsibility of the candidate to submit all the requisite documents mentioned in the notice. Applications received after the due date or found incomplete will be rejected straightaway without assigning any reason. The department will not be responsible for delay in receipt of applications due to any reason whatsoever. Shortlisted candidates will be called separately for the skill or physical test. For other desired qualifications, experience details and detailed selection criteria, candidates can refer to hpiph.org or the notice board of JSV Division Bilaspur.

content_sections.heading: HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Bilaspur Recruitment 2026: Overview
content_sections.text: The table below gives a quick overview of this HP Jal Shakti Vibhag recruitment notice.

rows.details: Jal Shakti Vibhag, Jal Shakti Division Bilaspur, Himachal Pradesh
Para Pump Operator, Para Fitter, Multipurpose Worker

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates should note the following confirmed date related to this engagement notice. The exact date on which this engagement notice was issued is not clearly mentioned in the available copy. Reference letters cited in the notice are dated 24 March 2026, 6 April 2026, 20 April 2026 and 23 April 2026.

content_sections.heading: HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Bilaspur Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: A total of 10 posts are available in Jal Shakti Division Bilaspur under this engagement notice. The notice states that the number of posts may increase or decrease depending on the vacancy position as per the requirement of Jal Shakti Vibhag.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Only bona-fide Himachali candidates are eligible to apply for this recruitment. Candidates belonging to SC, ST, OBC and EWS categories must submit their relevant category certificate along with the application. The educational qualification required for each post is given in the table below.

rows.educational_qualification: Matriculation (10th) with ITI certificate in the trade of Electrician/Wireman/Diesel Mechanic/Motor Mechanic/Pump Operator-cum-Mechanic/Mechanic (Motor Vehicle)/Pump Operation-cum-Mechanic/Pump Operation and Maintenance from a recognized ITI, OR Matriculation (10th) with certificate in the above trades under the Skill Development Scheme of the Government.

Matriculation (10th) with ITI certificate in the trade of Fitter/Plumber from a recognized ITI/Institute, OR Matriculation (10th) with certificate in the above trades under the Skill Development Scheme of the Government.
Middle pass (8th) or its equivalent from a school duly recognized by the State Government.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: The age limit for all three posts, Para Pump Operator, Para Fitter and Multipurpose Worker, is 18 to 45 years. The age-calculation date and category-wise age relaxation details are not mentioned in the notice.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection for Para Pump Operator, Para Fitter and Multipurpose Worker posts will be done through the following stages: Document screening and shortlisting, applicable if the number of applications received is much higher than the number of posts Skill test or physical test, as per the requirement of the post applied for Original certificates and testimonials will be verified at the time of evaluation, before the skill or physical test.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Bilaspur Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Eligible candidates can follow the steps below to apply. Download the application form for Para Pump Operator/Para Fitter/Multipurpose Worker from the notice or collect it from the JSV Division Bilaspur office. Fill in the applicant's name, father's name, date of birth, permanent home address and correspondence address in capital letters. Fill the educational and technical qualification table with marks obtained, total marks and percentage. Attach attested/self-attested copies of all required certificates. Sign the declaration confirming that the details provided are true and correct. Submit the completed application form to Jal Shakti Division Bilaspur on or before 5:00 PM on 17 August 2026. Candidates applying for more than one post must submit a separate application form for each post.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required
content_sections.text: Legitimate proof of age Proof of BPL family, if applicable (not older than six months) Proof of educational and technical qualification Certificate of Bonafide of Himachal Certificate and experience proof, if any, of the related field issued by the competent authority Category certificate (SC/ST/OBC) EWS category certificate issued by the competent authority (not older than six months) Candidates applying for the post of Multipurpose Worker must compulsorily attach the detailed marks sheet of Middle Standard (8th). If the marks sheet is not issued by the concerned Education Board, a detailed marks certificate from the school principal must be attached instead. Shortlisting for this post is based on marks obtained in the Middle Standard only, and not on any higher qualification.

content_sections.heading: Remuneration
content_sections.text: Para Pump Operator: ₹7,100 per month Para Fitter: ₹7,100 per month Multipurpose Worker: ₹6,000 per month

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Verify your eligibility for the post before applying. It is the responsibility of the candidate to submit all the requisite documents mentioned in the notice. Applications received after the due date or found incomplete will be rejected straightaway without assigning any reason. The department will not be responsible for delay in receipt of applications due to any reason whatsoever. Shortlisted candidates will be called separately for the skill or physical test. For other desired qualifications, experience details and detailed selection criteria, candidates can refer to hpiph.org or the notice board of JSV Division Bilaspur.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are available in HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Bilaspur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 10 vacancies are available: 3 Para Pump Operator, 2 Para Fitter and 5 Multipurpose Worker posts in Jal Shakti Division Bilaspur.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form is 17 August 2026, up to 5:00 PM, at Jal Shakti Division Bilaspur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is offline. Candidates must submit the filled application form on the prescribed proforma to the Jal Shakti Division Bilaspur office.

faq.question: Q4. Who is eligible to apply for these posts?
faq.answer: Only bona-fide Himachali candidates aged between 18 and 45 years, meeting the educational qualification prescribed for each post, are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification for Multipurpose Worker?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Middle standard (8th) or its equivalent from a school recognized by the State Government.

faq.question: Q6. What is the honorarium for these posts?
faq.answer: Para Pump Operator and Para Fitter will get ₹7,100 per month, while Multipurpose Worker will get ₹6,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee has not been mentioned in the engagement notice released by Jal Shakti Vibhag.

faq.question: Q8. Can a candidate apply for more than one post?
faq.answer: Yes, a candidate can apply for more than one post, but a separate application form must be submitted for each post individually.
